networkAccess.reasoning: cdnjs.cloudflare.com serves JSZip for ZIP export. localhost:8765 is the figma-relay server — handles all three flows (Osyle→Figma polling, Figma→Osyle POST, ACKs). app.osyle.com is not needed — unlike v2, this plugin's ui.html polls the relay directly instead of loading /figma-bridge as an iframe.
